name: onboarding
description: First-run onboarding: a config-driven step shell (progress dots, per-step ✕ skip, fade transitions, onDone) plus a first-run gate. Step content is app-specific; the account step reuses the accounts module's useAccounts().

notes: Step content (welcome, value props, taste/choice pickers, a preparing/handoff beat) is authored per app, the module ships the ENGINE, not the screens.
The account step depends on the `accounts` module (useAccounts). If an app has no accounts, omit that step.

requires.why: the account step reuses useAccounts(); optional if the app has no accounts

gate.note: In the app root (inside providers): render <OnboardingFlow> when !onboarded, else the app. Providers must wrap BOTH so the account step has useAccounts() and steps have theme.

verify: Fresh install shows onboarding; completion sets the flag and reveals the app
The account step advances on sign-in and its ✕ skips without an account
Reduce Motion collapses step transitions to a fade
